_comment: Sample input + expected output for amplify_preflight. Call this BEFORE Claude touches the system. The risk level and matched patterns let Claude (or you) decide whether to proceed, abort, or read more docs first.

args.task: Configure ZeptoClaw heartbeat to use a new model
args.context: Photon is rate-limited on the current heartbeat model; need to pick a replacement that won't crash the daemon.

matched_patterns.title: Don't use openai/ substring on ZeptoClaw

expected_response_shape.suggested_approach: Read tools/heartbeat-cron.mjs for the current model fallback chain. Verify any candidate against TPM and context-window requirements documented in family-architecture-BEDROCK.md. Avoid model names containing 'openai/' substring.
